question.text: When was SEBI established as a statutory body?

answer.text: 1992, with the SEBI Act provisions coming into effect on January 30, 1992
1988, when it was first set up as a regulatory body
1996, after the Depositories Act was passed

explanation.text: **The Logic:** SEBI was established as a non-statutory body on April 12, 1988. It was subsequently established as a statutory body in 1992, with the provisions of the SEBI Act, 1992 coming into effect on January 30, 1992. **The Trap:** 1988 was when SEBI was set up as a non-statutory body. The statutory establishment with legal powers came in 1992. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** The 1988-1992 distinction is important: SEBI existed for 4 years without legal enforcement powers before becoming a statutory body with the SEBI Act.
